chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1795 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 7087/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CMA 7088/25 4.For orders on CMA 7089/25 5.For hearing of main case 28-10-2025 **** 1. Urgent application is granted. 2to5. Mr. Riaz Hussain Malik, Advocate files Vakalatnama as well as statement for withdrawal of instant petition and submits that under instructions, he does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
